query_normalized: the influence of algorithmic recommendations on exploration vs. exploitation in online learning psychology
rationale: The paper focuses on technical hyperparameter optimization for Word2vec in recommendation systems to improve hit rates, which is distinct from the user's question regarding the psychological mechanisms of exploration vs. exploitation in online learning. It fails to measure the relevant psychological constructs, user behaviors, or causal mechanisms (exploration/exploitation trade-offs) and instead addresses an engineering efficiency problem in a different domain (NLP-based system tuning).
